flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 27% at Bay Path University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.2k vs 1.6k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Bay Path University fell 25% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5k → 1.1k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Bay Path University fell 21% between 2021 and 2024 (44.9% → 35.6%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Bay Path University fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (50.6% → 43.9%).
